parameters.subject: =Form Reminder Sent — {{ $json.caller_name }} ({{ $json.insurance_type }})
parameters.message:
=A gentle reminder SMS was sent to {{ $json.caller_name }} ({{ $json.caller_phone }}) to complete their {{ $json.insurance_type }} intake form.

Form was originally sent {{ $json.hours_since_sent }} hours ago.

If they still haven't completed it, a personal follow-up call may be needed.
